---
title: "Benjamin Black"
subtitle: "Head of the working group"
author: "Leiter der Arbeitsgruppe"
sortby: "1"
image: black_benjamin.jpg
toc: false
comments: false

about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: link
      text: website
      href: https://blenback.github.io/
---

<!-- ```{=html} -->
<!-- <meta http-equiv="Refresh" content="0; url='https://blenback.github.io/'" /> -->
<!-- ``` -->

:::{#person-profile}
:::
